name: Digestive enzymes
summary: Decision-ready summary: Digestive enzymes is best framed for meal-related digestive discomfort; enzyme insufficiency support; safety screen: pancreatitis unless clinician-directed; pork allergy for pancreatin forms.
description: Digestive enzymes supports digestion; meals with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.4: Generic digestive enzyme blends should be blocked unless matched to a specific intolerance/enzyme-deficiency evidence base. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.
claimMap.notes: v10.4: Generic digestive enzyme blends should be blocked unless matched to a specific intolerance/enzyme-deficiency evidence base. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Dose must be enzyme-specific and activity-unit based; generic mg dosing is not meaningful

sources.title: v9.4: Mostly animal/preclinical and influencer hype; keep out of monetization until human evidence exists. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.
